heading: Step 6: Configure the Function's Privacy Level
body:
By default, you can call a Function from client applications as well
as other Functions in the same application. You can prevent client
applications from seeing or calling a Function by setting
**Private** to `true`.

You can still call a private Function from [expression variables](atlas/app-services/rules/expressions) and
other Functions, including incoming webhooks and Triggers.

![The private Function toggle in the UI](/atlas-ui/images/triggers/private-function-toggle.png)
